article_title: IAsyncEnumerable<T>：流式处理数据，不把所有东西塞进内存
core_theme: 用 IAsyncEnumerable<T> 替换 ToListAsync()，将内存从 O(n) 压到 O(1)，并提供 4 个生产级可用的完整模式
reader_takeaway: 能立刻把 EF Core、HttpClient、文件处理、ASP.NET Core Controller 四种场景的 List<T> 改造为流式 IAsyncEnumerable<T>，知道 4 种常见坑及修复方法
summary_angle: 同样 100 万条记录：95 GB 内存爆炸 vs 150 MB 常驻 —— 改的只是返回类型

information_blocks.source_anchor: 500,000 database records, a List<T>, and a server with 8GB RAM. The math didn't work. Peak Memory: ~95 GB OutOfMemoryException
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧 BEFORE 面板：一个巨大的 List 桶装满数据，内存条冒烟爆炸，标签 '95 GB'

information_blocks.source_anchor: IAsyncEnumerable<T> lets you stream data asynchronously — processing items one by one as they arrive
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中心过渡：一条流动的数据管道，逐条传递而非整批

information_blocks.source_anchor: Peak Memory: ~150 MB (constant, regardless of dataset size). Time to first output: 50ms
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧 AFTER 面板：稳定的 150 MB 小容器，数据流动不间断，标签 '150 MB'

main_metaphor: 读书逐页 vs 先复印全书 —— 流式处理只在需要时才取下一页
primary_subject: 一条数据流管道，左侧连接数据库，右侧送出处理结果
subject_action: 管道持续传送单条记录，内存容量始终不变
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: dynamic cinematic storyboard style, sequential panels, camera-motion feeling, strong cuts, clear narrative beats
selected_style_reason: 随机从 40 项风格池中选中。文章本身有强烈的 before/after 戏剧弧线（API 崩溃 → 流式救援），动态分镜电影风的分格对照和叙事节奏与这个反差主题完美契合。
style_safety_note: 动态分镜电影风无强指向特定品牌或艺术家，直接使用安全描述词，无需改写。
draft_goal: 验证左右分格对照（爆炸 vs 稳定流动）的主叙事是否清晰，95 GB vs 150 MB 数字 chip 是否醒目
revision_targets: 如果分格不明显，增强中间管道/箭头的分割感
如果 95 GB 数字不够醒目，改为更大的红色标签
如果色调太暗，适当提亮 AFTER 面板
final_prompt:
Wide cover illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1. Dynamic cinematic storyboard style, sequential panels, camera-motion feeling, strong cuts, clear narrative beats. Editorial technical illustration style.

Layout: TWO clear horizontal panels side by side with a strong dividing line or gutter.

LEFT PANEL (BEFORE): Dark, urgent mood. A massive overflowing bucket/container labeled '95 GB' bursting with data records — cracks, smoke, explosion effect. A memory bar completely full and red. Chaotic, danger colors: deep red #e94560 and dark #1a1a2e.

RIGHT PANEL (AFTER): Calm, controlled mood. A smooth data pipeline/tube delivering single records one-by-one, a small steady container labeled '150 MB'. Serene, cool data flow in teal/cyan #4fc3f7. Memory bar showing minimal usage. A small chip '逐条流式' near the pipeline.

Allowed visible text (3 items only): '95 GB' on left explosion chip, '150 MB' on right steady container, '逐条流式' on pipeline chip.

No: fake terminal output, no fake dashboard, no fake chart, no cyberpunk neon clutter, no floating code rain, no robot figures, no watermark.
